title: AGP Wave 4A+ — Growth Intelligence Layer
executive_summary: Wave 4A+ transforms the Growth Score from a daily number into a full intelligence layer. The platform now explains every subscore change (prev/curr/delta/reason/root cause/expected trend), prioritises every recommendation across 6 impact axes, ranks all 428 active products by a 12-component Opportunity Score, forecasts 8 business metrics across 4 horizons (1/7/30/90d), and grades its own predictions every morning to self-improve. Live run on 24 June 2026 produced 13 score explanations, 13 AI-written business narratives, 18 prioritised actions, 428 ranked products, and 32 forecasts at $0.01 AI cost.
database_changes: agp_score_explanations (per-subscore delta, reason, root cause, expected trend)
agp_action_priorities (6 impact axes + difficulty + cost + confidence + priority_score)
agp_product_opportunity (12 components + expected ROI and revenue)
agp_prediction_accuracy (predicted vs actual, MAPE, weight adjustment)

high: Backfill 90 days of historical forecasts once signal lake has history
medium: Add competitor lake hookup so competition_risk is data-driven (currently flat 30)
Generate daily executive PDF briefing (cron 03:15 UTC)
low: Recharts visualisations for forecast confidence bands
Heat-map panel for impact-vs-difficulty priority matrix
